pass_rule: All blocking criteria must score 2. Any blocking criterion below 2 forces status fail or blocked.

criteria.statement: Every source has url, publisher, accessed_date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD), and source_type.
Every claim has non-empty official_source_ids, or is explicitly marked unverified.
No official=false source is the sole evidence of a verified claim.
decision.change_authorized=true only when all supporting claims are verified; justified_change names the exact change.
A non-empty blocking_gaps forces a status other than pass.
No claim is verified without a real, non-future accessed_date.
Where the doc states a version, currency against repo_version is recorded; cross-major docs are marked unverified.
Official-vs-official contradictions are recorded as blocking_gaps, not resolved silently.
Every source, claim, and verdict carries a provenance tag.
